MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lawrence James Less, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: De Li Tan
James F. Hannawalt,Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And The Attendant Form Interrogatory 17.1, is moot in part, granted in part, and denied in part. The motion is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The motion is granted as to Request For Admission Nos. 8 and 9. The court advises that the responses would be adequate as they are supplemented as set forth in the opposition's reasons no further response is required. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
